action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace. Analysis: Need an immediate end-to-end baseline with prediction contract validated and eval submitted. A frozen CLIP visual backbone with a trainable classifier is the fastest reliable baseline for this OOD wildlife image task, uses cached pretrained models offline, and can train on all 4 GPUs via DDP. Decision: Write model/train/predict scripts, train CLIP-B frozen classifier for 2 epochs with class-balanced CE, save best checkpoint, and submit eval immediately as required.
